name: yakubu-manage
description: Play your Yakubu Manage sound when code diagnostics or terminal commands fail.

yakubuManage.triggerOnDiagnostics.description: Play sound when editor diagnostics introduce errors.

yakubuManage.triggerOnTerminalFailures.description: Play sound when terminal shell integration reports non-zero exits.

yakubuManage.onlyOnNewDiagnosticErrors.description: Only play when diagnostic error count increases, not on every diagnostic refresh.

yakubuManage.minIntervalMs.description: Minimum time between sound events to prevent noise storms.

yakubuManage.customPlayCommand.description: Custom shell command to play a sound. If set, this command is used instead of built-in platform defaults.

yakubuManage.customSoundPath.description: Optional absolute path to a sound file for built-in platform commands.
